violations.text: Turkey breast was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Turkey breast was observed in the front of the refrigerator. Refrigerator was holding an ambient temperature of 41 DF at the time of inspection. Turkey was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025
The ceiling tiles in the prep area are stained and in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the storage closet and basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

Rice was observed held at 123 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
Beans were observed stored on the floor in the back storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

The ceiling tiles in the back kitchen/storage area is in poor repair, observed brown stains with previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2022
